title: BOHS White Foam Clay Lite - Squishy,Soft, Air Dry -for School Project,Cosplay,Fake Bake, Slime Supplies-100 Grams
features: Versatile Craft Material: Great for a variety of projects, including modeling, slime clay activities, school projects, and much more. Unleash your child's creativity!
Clean & Easy to use - No crumbles, easy to scuplt, model, sand, and paint; mix with white clay can lighten any other color clay
Air Dry: No need for baking or heating - just leave your creations out in the open air to dry. Your masterpieces will be ready in no time.
Decorate Items - The clay is sticky with styrofoam, glass, and metal, and once dry, it can be painted with markers or paints
Perfect Consistency: BOHS Foam Clay maintains a balance of firmness and pliability, making it easy for kids to sculpt but sturdy enough to hold its shape.
description: Product Description BOHS Foam Clay-Lite BOHS Foam Clay-Lite is a soft and stretchy air-dry modeling clay that is perfect for all your DIY projects! With its pliable texture, it can easily be molded into any shape you desire. The resealable package ensures that your clay stays fresh and ready to use whenever you need it. Not only is this foam clay great for DIY projects, but it's also a good slime ingredient that adds a unique texture to your slime creations. Use it to create beautiful cosplay masks, figure decorations, and even fake bakes for a realistic look. BOHS Foam Clay-Lite is your go-to choice for all your molding and crafting needs. Its soft, stretchy, and air-drying properties make it easy to work with, while its versatility lets you create a wide range of projects. Get your hands on the BOHS Foam Clay-Lite today and unleash your creativity! Resealable Bag Resealable bag for long-term storage and reuse. Cosplay Mask The BOHS clay sticks to styrofoam well, so it can be applied to the styrofoam skull to make the cosplay mask. Hand Print/ Paw Print The BOHS foam clay can not only be used as decorations but is also a good material for kids' hand and foot prints, even pet paw prints. Fake Bake The smooth and non-sticky quality makes BOHS foam clay a great material for fake baking. Butter Slime Ingredient BOHS Foam clay is a great ingredient to make butter slime or clay slime. It depends on the product size and the surrounding temperature and humidity. Using a hair dryer can shorten the drying time. What should I do if the clay dries up? If you find that the clay is dry and feels like rubber, you can put a few drops of water in the clay,Then seal it and store it in an environment around 25°C, and it will soften overnight. What should I do if the work is deformed? You can use: upside down to dry (for example: flowers, long strips, etc.); paper towels, cotton, etc. for cushioning (for example: balls, curved surfaces, etc.); toothpicks for fixing (for example: heads, hands and other parts). What should I do if I eat clay by mistake? According to our test and experience, under normal circumstances, after a child or pet eats a small amount by mistake, give him (her) to drink more warm water, eat more crude fiber food to promote excretion, and no adverse symptoms will occur. How to make BOHS Foam Clay waterproof? BOHS foam clay is not naturally waterproof. To make it waterproof, you can: Apply a varnish or sealant to create a protective layer. Use waterproof glue to form a moisture barrier. Add a coat of wax for water resistance. How to make butter slime with BOHS FOAM CLAY? Three Materials are needed: BOHS Foam Clay (any colors) clear school glue contact lens solution or diluted borax Instructions: 1. Pour some school glue into a container 2. Add a small amount of the contact lens solution or diluted borax to the glue separately 3-5 times, stirring constantly. Stirring the mixture until it starts to come together and form a sticky mass.Knead the mass with your hands until it reaches an elastic and non-sticky texture. The key trick is to add the lens solution or diluted borax several times in small amounts.Do NOT pour the solution or diluted borax too much at a time. 3. Take a portion of BOHS Foam Clay (approximately one-third of the volume of the slime) and combine the slime and BOHS Foam Clay, kneading them together until they are fully mixed and have a smooth, buttery texture. Once you have created your clay slime (or butter slime), you can enjoy your new, unique creation. Remember to store the slime in an airtight container when not in use to prevent it from drying out.
